# CryptForge — Developer Security Toolkit by DevrimSoft

> CryptForge is a free, fully client-side developer security toolkit. All cryptographic operations run in the browser using the Web Crypto API. No data is sent to any server.

## Product Info

- **Name:** CryptForge
- **URL:** https://randompassword.devrimsoft.com
- **Developer:** DevrimSoft (https://devrimsoft.com)
- **Contact:** info@devrimsoft.com.tr
- **Type:** Web Application (Static, Single Page)
- **Cost:** Free
- **Privacy:** Zero data collection, no backend, no cookies, no tracking

## Tools

### Password Generator
Generate cryptographically secure passwords with configurable length (4-250 characters), uppercase/lowercase letters, numbers, symbols, custom symbol sets, and option to exclude ambiguous characters (0, O, I, l, 1). Uses crypto.getRandomValues() with Fisher-Yates shuffle.

### Password Strength Checker
Analyze password strength with entropy calculation (bits), charset size estimation, estimated crack time, and a 0-4 score (Very Weak to Very Strong). Detects patterns, repetition, and common weaknesses.

### JWT Token Generator
Generate JSON Web Tokens with HS256, HS384, or HS512 algorithms. Supports custom header and payload JSON, configurable expiry, and one-click quick generation with random secrets.

### Hash Generator
Compute cryptographic hashes in real-time: MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512. Uses Web Crypto API's crypto.subtle for SHA variants and a built-in MD5 implementation for browser compatibility.

### Token Generator
Generate various security tokens:
- UUID v4 (RFC 4122 compliant)
- CSRF tokens (32 bytes, hex encoded)
- API keys (sk_ prefix + 24 random bytes, base64)
- Hex tokens (configurable byte length)
- Base64 tokens (configurable byte length)
- Secret keys (256-bit, base64)

## Technical Details

- **Framework:** Astro 5 (static site generation)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Crypto:** Web Crypto API (crypto.getRandomValues(), crypto.subtle)
- **Languages:** 6 (Turkish, English, Russian, Ukrainian, German, Spanish)
- **Themes:** Dark and Light mode
- **Deployment:** Cloudflare Workers

## Links

- Main: https://randompassword.devrimsoft.com
- DevrimSoft: https://devrimsoft.com
- Sitemap: https://randompassword.devrimsoft.com/sitemap-index.xml
